title: Amid Growing Data Center Backlash, Nvidia Could Have the Answer
excerpt: Nvidia's self-cooling technology could partially solve a contentious issue.
content_html:
Across the country, municipalities and states are passing legislation that limits or even bans data centers. This is in response to growing concerns that the artificial intelligence (AI) industry is gobbling up resources such as electricity and water while creating noise pollution. It's a serious issue that major players in the AI industry must address immediately. Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) may be able to solve at least a portion of the problem.

Nvidia's Rubin-generation AI infrastructure eliminates the need for cooling fans that gulp up water. Instead, these new chips and networking components are cooled by a closed-loop liquid coolant. Most importantly, they work without requiring fresh water.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Unfortunately, it doesn't solve the issue of the water used to generate data center electricity. However, it's still a massive engineering feat and an important step toward solving a major problem.

The water crisis is far more than just a PR nightmare for the AI industry; there are real human and environmental consequences. Nvidia is already dominating in chips, but could become a favorite in the public eye if its new technology helps alleviate some water pressure.

I would anticipate Nvidia's self-cooling chips and components becoming the industry standard, giving the company yet another competitive advantage. Nvidia's stock is down slightly over the past month, and trading well below the analysts' consensus of about $300 per share. For bullish investors, now might be a good time to buy the company that could become a leader in solving AI's water problem.

Should you buy stock in Nvidia right now?

Before you buy stock in Nvidia, consider this:

The Motley Fool Stock Advisor analyst team just identified what they believe are the 10 best stocks for investors to buy now… and Nvidia wasn't one of them. The 10 stocks that made the cut could produce monster returns in the coming years.

Consider when Netflix made this list on December 17, 2004... if you invested $1,000 at the time of our recommendation, you'd have $400,964!* Or when Nvidia made this list on April 15, 2005... if you invested $1,000 at the time of our recommendation, you'd have $1,272,955!*

Now, it's worth noting Stock Advisor's total average return is 930% — a market-crushing outperformance compared to 210% for the S&P 500. Don't miss the latest top 10 list, available with Stock Advisor, and join an investing community built by individual investors for individual investors.

content_html_zh:
全国各地的市政府和州都在通过立法限制甚至禁止数据中心。 这是为了回应人们日益担心的人工智能（AI）行业正在吞噬电力和水等资源，同时造成噪音污染。 这是人工智能行业主要参与者必须立即解决的一个严重问题。 Nvidia（纳斯达克股票代码：NVDA）或许能够解决至少部分问题。

Nvidia 的 Rubin 一代人工智能基础设施消除了需要消耗水的冷却风扇。 相反，这些新芯片和网络组件由闭环液体冷却剂冷却。 最重要的是，它们的工作不需要淡水。

错过了 2009 年的 Nvidia？ 这个罕见的信号再次闪烁。 2009年，一家名不见经传的芯片制造商英伟达发出了“双倍下跌”的信号。 多年来，对于一家规模仅为 Nvidia 1/100 的公司来说，同样的“完全确信”信号闪烁。 继续 ”

不幸的是，它并没有解决数据中心发电用水的问题。 然而，这仍然是一项巨大的工程壮举，也是解决重大问题的重要一步。

水危机不仅仅是人工智能行业的公关噩梦，更是人工智能行业的公关噩梦。这会对人类和环境产生真正的影响。 英伟达已经在芯片领域占据主导地位，但如果其新技术有助于缓解一些水压，它可能会成为公众眼中的最爱。

我预计英伟达的自冷却芯片和组件将成为行业标准，从而为该公司带来另一个竞争优势。 Nvidia 的股价在过去一个月小幅下跌，交易价格远低于分析师平均预期的每股 300 美元。 对于看涨的投资者来说，现在可能是购买这家可能成为解决人工智能水问题领导者的公司的好时机。

你现在应该购买英伟达的股票吗？

在购买 Nvidia 股票之前，请考虑以下因素：

Motley Fool Stock Advisor 分析师团队刚刚确定了他们认为最适合投资者购买的 10 只股票…… 英伟达并不是其中之一。 入选的 10 只股票可能会在未来几年产生巨额回报。

考虑一下 Netflix 在 2004 年 12 月 17 日列出此列表时的情况…… 如果您在我们推荐时投资了 1,000 美元，您将获得 400,964 美元！*或者当 Nvidia 于 2005 年 4 月 15 日列出此列表时...... 如果您在我们推荐时投资了 1,000 美元，您将获得 1,272,955 美元！*

现在，值得注意的是 Stock Advisor 的总平均回报率为 930%，与标准普尔 500 指数的 210% 相比，这是一个压倒市场的表现。 不要错过股票顾问提供的最新前 10 名名单，并加入由个人投资者为个人投资者建立的投资社区。
